description_long: This is a rectangular, mid-rise apartment building with a flat, weathered roof and a brick exterior. The front facade features a central open stairwell with concrete steps leading to upper floors, flanked by rows of windows with some covered by blinds or curtains. The building's sides are plain, with evenly spaced vertical black lines breaking up the brickwork. The rear facade displays a symmetrical arrangement of windows, with no visible balconies or external fire escapes. The roof shows signs of aging, with patches and discoloration, and the overall structure appears utilitarian and functional. The building is likely constructed with reinforced concrete and brick, typical of mid- to late-20th-century urban residential architecture.
description: A rectangular, brick apartment building with a flat, weathered roof and a central open stairwell. The facade features rows of windows and a utilitarian, symmetrical design.
description_view_0: The front view shows the central open stairwell, concrete steps, and the main entrance, flanked by windows on both sides.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain brick wall with vertical black lines and a partial view of the stairwell structure.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a symmetrical arrangement of windows across all floors, with no visible entrances or balconies.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing a plain brick wall with vertical black lines and a partial stairwell structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in symmetrical vertical columns on all facades, evenly spaced and aligned horizontally across each floor.
